sourcePrompt: A rural warehouse or supply depot, a long low building about fifteen meters by eight. Cinder-block walls to waist height with corrugated-metal sheeting above, a corrugated gable roof with shallow pitch, a pair of large sliding cargo doors on the long face hung from an exterior rail, and a few small high windows. Rust-streaked silver steel over gray block, plain and industrial.
handEdit: both roof slopes extended 4.34->4.9 on their 14.68deg planes: eaves now drop to y=3.36 (below 3.5 wall top) with ~0.85m overhang - flush stub eaves read as two flaps propped up; ribs ride parents
